title: LandUseRecommendation
description: A Staten Island Borough President recommendation on a land-use application under the Uniform Land Use Review Procedure (ULURP) or a related review. Under the NYC Charter the borough president holds an advisory review step: after the affected community board, the BP issues a written recommendation to the City Planning Commission. NET-NEW as data: these recommendations are published today only as PDFs / notices on statenislandusa.com (the Office of Land Use, Planning & Infrastructure) and in the City Planning ZAP system — there is no BPSI API or Open Data twin. Modeled from the office's charter role, not from an existing dataset.

x-source.office: Office of Land Use, Planning & Infrastructure
x-source.citywide_system: NYC Dept. of City Planning ZAP (Zoning Application Portal)

applicationId.description: ULURP / City Planning application number (e.g. 'C 240123 ZMR').

recommendationDate.description: Date the BP recommendation was issued.

communityBoardRecommendation.description: The prior community board vote/recommendation, if noted.

conditions.description: Any conditions or modifications attached to the recommendation.

documentUrl.description: Link to the published recommendation letter (PDF).
